_comment: MrFoX-MeM hook wiring (WINDOWS). Copy the "hooks" block into your .claude/settings.json (project-level: <project>\.claude\settings.json, or user-level: %USERPROFILE%\.claude\settings.json). On Windows the interpreter is usually 'python' (not 'python3'). SUBSTITUTE the absolute path below with where MrFoX-MeM lives on your machine. Forward slashes work inside JSON strings on Windows, so 'C:/Users/you/...' is valid; backslashes would need to be escaped as '\\'. Set MRFOX_API and MRFOX_PROJECT in your env (see .env.example). Hooks fail open: if the core API is down they exit 0 silently and never block the session.
